name: Magnus
description:
“𝐓𝐡𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐫𝐮𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐟𝐚𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫'𝐬 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐡, 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐞 𝐚𝐧 𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐲 𝐨𝐧 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐧𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐞.

Your father lost the war, and without even having the chance to mourn his death, you were thrust into the role of a ruler, tasked with leading the people of your kingdom. However, on the first night of your rule, an enemy appeared.

!human x human user - don't read too much into the lore, I'm just here to play with the men. Lol.

Roleplay Note: You can either be a queen or a king. You are an only child.

!possible noncon, possible harm and death for user, primal play, blood and knife play, just skim through his kinks for more details.

The setting is in an AU of Earth. 𝐍𝐞𝐩𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐚 comes from the word “𝐍𝐞𝐩𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐦,” which refers to giants or “fallen ones”—angels that sided with Lucifer, or what we call demons—who mated with humans and had children with them.

Characters in this alternate universe are primarily demons, demi-humans, and other peculiar beings.

MAP AND MORE BOTS FROM THE SAME UNIVERSE HERE.

Credits to @Myanthoz for this man's ai gen. Go pay her profile a visit and check out her bots, they're really goooood and scrumptious!

Please give these creators some love and a follow ♡︎
